description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a wood-textured exterior. The front features a large garage door, a main entryway with glass panels, and several large windows that allow ample natural light inside. The interior is partially visible, revealing furnished rooms including a living area with a pink sectional sofa, a dining area, and a study or office space. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a balcony or terrace area, enhancing the open and airy feel of the design. The house is constructed primarily from wood and glass, with metal likely used for structural support and window frames. The overall layout is asymmetrical, with distinct volumes and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a wood-textured exterior, large windows, and a flat roof, featuring a garage and open-plan living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage door, large windows, and partial interior layout with visible living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive glass windows, open-plan living area with pink sofa, and balcony/terrace space.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wood-textured wall, a single large window, and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the garage, study/office space, and additional windows, as well as the rear balcony.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with glass-paneled door, no porch, and minimal overhang, flanked by large windows and a garage door.
